listOfQuestions.question: Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: The proportional relationship between width and height?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A sequence of drawings or panels planning visual scenes?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A planned list of camera shots for production?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Supplementary footage used to support the main footage?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Narration recorded over visuals?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A direct transition from one shot to another?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A gradual transition to or from an image or sound?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Adjusting color and tone for style and consistency?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Adjusting color so whites appear neutral?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Reducing media file size through encoding?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Software or method used to encode and decode media?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: The amount of data used per second of media?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: The editing workspace where clips are arranged over time?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A separate visual or audio element stacked with others?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A marker defining a property value at a point in time?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: A shape used to hide or reveal part of a layer?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Rendering a finished media file from a project?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: Legal protection for creative works?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: The detail of an image or video measured by pixel dimensions?
Which Digital Media Production concept is described by this clue: How many video frames are shown each second?
